Together with a 75th generation descendant of the sage himself, they explore one of Confucius' lifelong pursuits: To cultivate oneself for the betterment of others. From the sophisticated cooking techniques and dining etiquette of Confucian cuisine, which was used for banqueting emperors and aristocrats, to getting hands on with street food and local delicacies, Tianran explores how Confucius' ideals have permeated through modern day life in Qufu.

programme.title: Wild Wonders Ep.2
programme.desc: China's vast land features extraordinary geological diversity and climate zones. Home to 5,000 years of civilization and 1.4 billion people, it sustains the world's second-largest economy while sheltering over 2,000 nature reserves. This documentary spotlights China's natural heritage for tomorrow's possibilities.

programme.title: Ding Porcelain Firing
programme.desc: In ancient times, skilled craftsmen combined clay with fire and, using nothing more than their hands and wisdom, created the history of porcelain.A thousand years ago, at the time of the Northern Song Dynasty, a type of porcelain was produced that stood out for its exquisite quality, elegant coloring and beautiful patterns. This was Ding porcelain, and it became a favorite at the imperial court. However, within 200 years, amid the chaos of constant warfare, the art of making it was lost. The dazzling white light of the Ding kilns had faded, seemingly forever. And yet, 800 years later, that light has been reignited.

programme.title: A Touch of Speed: The Art of Wing Chun
programme.desc: Uncover the principles of Wing Chun, a unique Chinese martial art renowned for its efficiency and directness. This program explores its legendary origins, core concepts like the center line theory, and its practical application in close-quarters combat. Witness the subtle power and intellectual depth of this sophisticated fighting system.

programme.title: A Touch of Speed: The Art of Wing Chun
programme.desc: Uncover the principles of Wing Chun, a unique Chinese martial art renowned for its efficiency and directness. This program explores its legendary origins, core concepts like the center line theory, and its practical application in close-quarters combat. programme.title: Quyang Stone Carving
programme.desc: Quyang is known as a hometown of Chinese carving. Quyang's stone carving works are popular around different parts of China, thus also exported to over 100 countries and regions worldwide. The style of Quyang stone carving both carries the mysterious and rough spirit of the Wei Dynasty and the natural and graceful forms of the Tang and Song dynasties. It reflects the life experiences and live philosophies of local artisans. Each statue's showcases unique oriental aesthetics.

programme.title: Quyang Stone Carving
programme.desc: Quyang is known as a hometown of Chinese carving. programme.title: Grand Song of the Dong — Natural Oriental Harmony
programme.desc: The Grand Song of the Dong is a polyphonic folk singing tradition of the Dong ethnic group. Performers from several villages gather together to sing, unaccompanied.The songs, which describe the history, beliefs, customs, and emotions of the Dong people, are an important part of their cultural identity and contribute significantly to their social cohesion.Generally sung in the Dong language, which has no written form, they are passed on orally from one generation to the next. Classified into various genres—including narrative and love songs, drinking and funeral songs—they are often accompanied by clapping, stomping, and dancing.Sung on occasions such as festivals, weddings, and...

programme.sub-title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato

programme.desc: Portugal’s coastline becomes a stage for tradition, art, and contemporary expression, from the vibrant rituals of Festa das Cruzes, to the colourful installations of The Umbrella Sky Project transforming public spaces, and the Walk & Talk Biennale, where art, architecture, and community intersect across the landscape.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Experiencing Madrid at its fun-loving best, we stare down a flamenco dancer, nibble pigs' ears, and ogle lavish palaces before side-tripping for some unforgettable history.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: The Deep Med
programme.desc: Laurent Ballesta has yet again challenged himself to a new world record: spend 28 days at a depth of 100 meters, pushing the limits of his body to reveal the luxuriant and unknown depths of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Medea
programme.desc: The tragic tale of Medea, a powerful sorceress betrayed by her lover, Jason. Consumed by rage and heartbreak, she enacts a devastating revenge. The story delves into love, betrayal, and the dark extremes of human emotion.

programme.title: PUCCINI TU TU PICCOLO ADDIO
programme.desc: In the final moments of Madama Butterfly, Cio-Cio-San sings "Tu, tu, piccolo Iddio", a tender farewell to her son before making the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.sub-title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.desc: In this 2022 concert in Turin, Marc Albrecht conducts the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai, with Simone Lamsma as the violin soloist. The programme includes Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1, showcasing Lamsma's technical brilliance and emotional depth, and Franck's Symphony in D minor, celebrated for its rich harmonies and cyclical structure. The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Whats On Bridges of Art and Cinema Turkey
programme.sub-title: Whats On Bridges of Art and Cinema Turkey
programme.desc: Turkey’s cultural landscape is shaped by cinema, contemporary art, and live performance, from the Adana Golden Boll Film Festival, celebrating national and regional filmmaking, to the Istanbul Biennial, a major platform for international contemporary art. Music and the performing arts take centre stage through the Istanbul Music Festival, Istanbul Theatre Festival, and Istanbul Jazz Festival, reflecting the country’s role as a crossroads of Mediterranean and global culture.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The spotlight falls on two traditional Cypriot favorites. First, we explore the art of preparing Oven Lamb Kleftiko, a slow-cooked dish where tender lamb is infused with herbs and baked to perfection, capturing the essence of village cooking. Then, the journey continues with Kattimeria, fried sweet flatbreads that balance crisp texture with a hint of indulgent sweetness. Together, these recipes showcase the comforting richness and variety of Cyprus’s culinary heritage.

programme.title: Panel Tokenizing Real Estate
programme.desc: Tokenization is transforming real estate by turning property into digital assets that can be bought, sold, and shared with unprecedented flexibility. programme.title: Concerto - OSN Luisi Malofeev Torino 2021
programme.desc: In May 2021, pianist Alexander Malofeev joined conductor Fabio Luisi and the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai for a performance at Turin's Auditorium RAI Arturo Toscanini. The program featured Franz Liszt's Piano Concerto No. 1 in E-flat major and Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 6 in B minor, "Pathétique." Malofeev's interpretation of Liszt's concerto was particularly noted for its expressive depth and technical prowess.

programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson makes some noise in TVR's new T350, a £40,000 coupe which promises 175mph, and 4 seconds to 60. Plus we find the ultimate bargain car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests he BMW M5, by driving from the UK to the famous Pau circuit in the South of France. Tom Ford tests the world's maddest car - the Ariel Atom.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: We pit the Ford Sierra Cosworth and the Mercedes 190E Cosworth against each other. Tim in London investigates the new craze of car share clubs. Tiff drives the brand new Nissan 370Z around what used to be one of the fastest race circuits in Europe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki tests the Mercedes Vito X or the VW Transporter Sportline on the track to find out which is quickest. Jonny embarks on the 600 mile transcontinental trip in the BMW 635d. Tom drives the ultimate 4x4, the 12 tonne, 10 foot tall Unimog.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato races two estates head to head. Vicki Butler-Henderson pits the new Pro-Ceed against the VW Golf. Jonny Smith picks up an amazing luxury car for £1000 or less. Tiff Needell runs Fifth Gear's most exciting car v bike race to date.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if an old Daihatsu Charade is the toughest car you can buy; Tom Ford drives the Honda CRV, the SUV that claims to be greener than a MINI Cooper.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: What do you think is more dangerous - driving whilst being drunk, or driving whilst being tired? Tiff Needell spends a day in the pub and Quentin Willson deprives himself of sleep for 2 days.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason takes two sporty convertibles - the Mini Cooper Cabriolet and Mazda MX-5 onto the track for a hair-do busting shootout. Tim Shaw heads to a garage...with no mechanics! Tiff spends some quality time in the brand new Aston Martin V12 Vantage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford takes puts the Grande Punto Abarth through its hot hatch paces. Tim Shaw finds out if it's possible to save huge amounts of money by servicing your car yourself. Bruno Senna joins the programme as a special guest presenter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of we're literally taking Fifth Gear to new heights and celebrating the most spectacular challenge petrol-heads have ever invented.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson jets off to Portugal to drive the new Mazda MX5. It's the best selling sportscar in the world, but have Mazda fixed something that wasn't broken.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason pits the brand-new Renault Sport Clio 200 against a tough competitor from the past - the Renault Clio 182 Cup. Retired Formula One driver, and current TV pundit David Coulthard, meets up with Tiff Needell for an extreme van driving challenge

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki takes the Focus RS and the Escort Cosworth to find out once and for all which handles best around a track. Jason drives the Grand Tourer and delivers his verdict whether the £78,000 asking price would represent money well spent.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests the latest car to join the elite ranks of road cars capable of over 200mph includes such mouthwatering prospects as the Enzo Ferrari, the Pagani Zonda, and the Porsche Carerra GT .

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson has a mini-moto race against some of the biggest names in bike racing; Tom Ford tests the new Land Rover Freelander on Britain's most remote school run.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff tests this grand tourer's handling through the dramatic scenery of Snowdonia in Wales. Jason Plato tests the brand new £115,000 Aston Martin DB9 Volante, one of the fastest cabriolets on sale today.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests a comprehensive selection of the latest hot hatches including the new and long-awaited Ford Focus RS. He rules out the MGZR, the Mini Cooper S and the Renault Clio Cup.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes on a rather expensive road trip - in a £250,000 Rolls Royce Phantom. Tom Ford is testing the new Porsche Cayenne Turbo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff indulges in an end of term treat a classic Fifth Gear shootout, featuring some classic hot hatches from the 1980s. Tim investigates the great diesel versus petrol debate. Jonny visits his idea of automotive hell at the Firecracker Banger meet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford and Jonny Smith enter a demolition derby in two unlikely vehicles, Reliant Robins. Tiff Needell tests the latest Porsche 911, the GT3RS. Vicki Butler-Henderson drives the new Vauxhall VXR8.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this special episode of the programme we reveal the winners of the Fifth Gear Awards 2006. There will be prizes for Best Small Car, Best Family Car, Best Fast Car and the overall Car of the Year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato tests the new 911 Turbo, Vicki Butler-Henderson presents a high speed crash test, and Tom Ford drives a new Lamborghini.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell has a tough assignment. Our selfless road tester has to fly to Nice to drive the ultimate Mercedes-Benz, the flagship of the range, the £120,000 plus CL65.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear will be testing three of the most economical cars on the market. There's the petrol-powered Daihatsu Charade and the diesel-powered Citroen C2 and the "hybrid" Toyota Prius.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and new boy Ben Collins - the driver who used to be The Stig perform a two wheel driving stunt, Vicki Butler-Henderson puts the radical new four door Mini Countryman through its paces, Tiff Needell races two fast but green coupes head to head.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff conducts a crash test to show why everyone should make sure their next car has electronic stability control. Vicki is at a motor show in Monte Carlo, where she reveals the latest Pagani hypercar and test drives the controversial Fisker Karma.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this episode Tiff Needell and Jason Plato take the new Ford Mustang and Chevrolet Camaro on track to find out if the Americans are now producing performance cars us Brits should be taking notice of.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Jason try to find a decent new car for just £10,000. Vicki checks out the new Lamborghini Urus, and the team find the biggest BMW ever made, the new X7.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason rips through Italy in the brand-new Gallardo Superleggera. Vicki gets under the skin of the new Nissan Cube. Jonny examines Volvo's S80 DRIVe with the help of a yacht. Tiff and Jason do battle in the R8 Spyder and Porsche 911 Turbo Cabriolet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Vicki review two mighty 4x4's in one of the shows muddiest Dog Fights. Elsewhere, the team hit the road in the all-new Alpine A110 to find out what's changed since the first incarnation hit our streets back in 1961.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests a new estate car from Ferrari, Vicki Butler-Henderson puts two luxurious diesels saloons against each other on the track.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason is joined by ex-Ferrari F1 driver Mika Salon to pit the brand new £100,000 Mercedes C63 AMG Black Series against its key rival from BMW. Tiff celebrates the iconic Ferrari F40's 25th birthday with a track drive of one of the best in the world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Italy testing the most powerful Ferrari ever made, the brand new 730bhp F12berlinetta, to the limit. Tiff and Jason are at the track with the two cheapest hot hatches on sale - the Suzuki Swift and Renault Sport Twingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson learns the skills needed to drive in the Special Forces, from former Royal Marine sniper Aldo Kane.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The GR Yaris is an iconic Hot Hatch of the modern era. To see if it earns this credit, Jason Plato puts it up against two equally iconic classic cars.

programme.desc: Determined to play the piano, Mr Bean finds a tune in his heart and sausages for fingers.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Scrapper gives Bean fleas, and Bean is forced to call in the pest control person.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is locked in a department store overnight having the time of his life.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animated Season 04
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 Fitness Instructor / Trampoline Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes Mr Paliwal’s personal trainer for the day

programme.title: Mr Bean Animated Season 04
programme.desc: Mr Bean wants to watch his favourite TV show with Billy, but Mrs Wicket has other plans.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Bean discovers Mrs. Wicket’s nephew and Bruiser Jnr swopping football stickers.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to deal with an unwanted house guest but the stubborn rat refuses to leave.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animated Season 04
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 A Day in Bed / Karting Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean decides to stay in bed all day.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean drives her and Miss Wince to their booked spa retreat.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket is persuaded by a jaunty estate agent to put her house up for sale.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The Great Eduardo, violinist supreme, is in town and Irma wants to go to the concert.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: While Mr. Bean is taking photos of wildlife, he sees big footprints belonging to a dinosaur.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean dog-sits for Irma and while in the park comes across a professional dog-walker.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean stay in to take delivery of a new lounge chair.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean runs rings around the town.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a superhero in an attempt to stop a cunning thief.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean has to replace his landlady’s cat after an unfortunate ‘accident’.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean, badgered by a strange pink animal, warms to the creature when it shows its true colours.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean learns that generosity can be an effective weapon against greed, gluttony and getting your hands back on your own TV remote control.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean forgets his teddy’s Birthday - then gives him a treat to remember.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attends a hypnotism show where he unwittingly volunteers to be hypnotized.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean’s hobby goes down in flames in his battle for air supremacy.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel!

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to read his book but gets interrupted by too much noise.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean takes to the air after being taken for a ride.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E84 A Plan and a Promise - Part 1
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup heats up as Yugo and Celina tear through the tricky twists and turns of a transforming duel track!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E85 A Plan and a Promise - Part 2
programme.desc: Yugo’s in for a bumpy ride as he’s forced to zigzag his way across a duel track that’s been mapped for mayhem by Roget!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Furious over Celina's failure at the Friendship Cup, Roget sends a squad of Sector Security to seize her.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E87 The Many Dimensions of Yuya
programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Crow takes a turn for the worse when Roget takes control of Yuya’s mind!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Crow gets a crash course on double crossing when Yuya pulls a U-turn on their friendship!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Obelisk Force has invaded New Domino City to capture Zuzu and Celina! Can Yuya and his friends stop this unstoppable force?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E90 Down With the Underground
programme.desc: Barrett has returned to snatch Celina back to Duel Academy – unless the Lancers can stop him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Barrett has chained up Yuya and his monsters! Can Yuya break his shackles before Barrett breaks away with Celina?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Barrett comes to a shocking conclusion when a mind-controlled madman drops into their duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: It’s Jack’s most dangerous duel ever as he takes on Roget’s maniacal minion - Sergey!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Can Jack Atlas best Sergey, when Sergey combines the best of man and machine?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters... the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon! What chance does Yugi’s band of mortal monsters have against an Egyptian God?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spell Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand, so Strings’s Slifer the Sky Dragon can grow to infinite attack power! Can Yugi discover Slifer’s one fatal flaw before he’s annihilated by tens of thousands of attack points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts! If Joey wins, he’ll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye! However, little does Joey realize that he has bigger problems than this duel; the Rare Hunters are closing in on his location…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako’s oceanic warrior The Legendary Fisherman unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey’s monsters from the depths of the sea! Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he’s all washed out!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E21 Double Duel, Part 1: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Abductions abound! Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Téa! To make matters worse, the Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper! The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E22 Double Duel, Part 2: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba’s tumultuous teamwork! Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they’re sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Double Duel, Part 3: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it’s too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius, a monstrous menace even more powerful than Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Double Duel, Part 4: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior! However, little does Yugi know that Umbra and Lumis have one final mask to turn Yugi’s monsters against him…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends! But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they’ve faced… and will be facing in the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E26 Friends 'Til the End, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s friend vs. friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi! The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes! Can Yugi break Joey out of his spell, or will Joey break Yugi?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E27 Friends 'Til the End, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi’s life points, Yugi can’t bring himself to attack his dear friend! Yugi summons Joey’s favorite monster Red-Eyes B. Dragon to try to bring Joey back to his senses. Will seeing his favorite card help Joey break Marik’s spell, or is Yugi’s last ditch effort a lost cause?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E28 Friends 'Til the End, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik’s spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle! When Joey draws the card he needs to decimate Yugi’s life points, what chance does Yugi have, especially on his own?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E29 Friends 'Til the End, Part 4
programme.desc: There’s only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea! Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom? However, there may be a special savior who just regained her eyesight…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Shadow of a Duel
programme.desc: It’s the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz’s zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City Finals! But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It’s the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage! Will Mai succumb to Jean-Claude’s charm, not to mention his cadre of ninja monsters, or will she send him packing back to Tinseltown?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 Let the Finals Begin!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City Finals begin! The eight finalists will have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky! Yugi and friends finally meet the other finalists, but none of them are who they appear to be…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s the first duel of the Battle City Finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring that's possessing Bakura! Yugi quickly dispatches Bakura’s grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 2
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns! If that’s not bad enough, Bakura’s Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi’s life points every time Yugi attacks! Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi’s trapped!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E35 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi’s Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster! Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals, or will he surrender to save Bakura’s life but lose the only chance to protect the world from Marik’s evil?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 A Duel to Remember
programme.desc: Yusei Fudo is left unconscious after his harsh Duel with Trudge. The twins Leo and Luna rescue him. After Yusei regains consciousness, Leo demands a Duel with him. Meanwhile, Trudge waits outside in the hopes of capturing Yusei.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Bloom of the Black Rose
programme.desc: Yusei Fudo decides to enter the Fortune Cup, after Lazar blackmailed him to do so, if he wants to see his friends at Satellite alive. On his way, he meets up with his old friends from the Facility, Bolt Tanner and Yanagi and his new friend, Leo at the Daimon Area. Leo and his friend Dexter went to the Daimon Area in order to challenge the mysterious Black Rose.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Welcome to the Fortune Club
programme.desc: The Fortune Cup has now begun. The first Duel is Luna vs. Greiger. But since Luna doesn't want to participate, Leo disguises himself and Duels in her place.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Battle With the Black Rose
programme.desc: Luna and Dexter try to cheer up Leo after his loss to Greiger. They approach Yusei, who tells him the experience he got from losing should prove useful later on. Leo encourages Yusei to win, just before Akiza passes them. She glares intensely at Yusei as she passes. The other three quickly step out of her way. Leo wonders what her problem is.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Hunter Pace, under the disguise of Shira, Duels Yusei Fudo in the Fortune Cup, using a Deck he's designed to use against Jack Atlas.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Roget declares himself leader of New Domino City! Can the Lancers overthrow this madman, or will Roget’s Sector Security end any chances they have?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup finale is finally here! Jack and Yuya square off to see who will become New Domino City’s newest champion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Jack pushes Yuya to his limits in the Friendship Cup finale! Does Yuya have the dueltaining skills to dethrone the Master of Faster, or will Jack’s rule reign supreme?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: With the City on the edge of their seats, a new champion is about to be crowned! But who will sit in the winner’s circle: Yuya or Jack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup may be over, but trouble sure isn’t! Roget is planning to take Zuzu to Duel Academy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya reaches a new place - Heartland City, the hometown of Yuto and Shay in the Xyz Dimension along with Sylvio and Gong. There they meet Duel Academy soldiers and an independent warrior from that dimension.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E101 Realm of The Cipher Dragon
programme.desc: Gongenzaka and Sawatari fight against the mysterious Kaito, who believes them to be agents of Academia. As he summons his fearsome Galaxy Eyes Cipher Dragon, Yuto notes that something has changed in Kaito.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Kaito begins a merciless assault against Yuya with his powerful Galaxy Eyes deck. With Yuto's spirit on his side, Yuya tries to match Kaito's indomitable spirit with both Odd Eyes Pendulum Dragon and Dark Rebellion Xyz Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E103 Rise of the Resistance
programme.desc: Yuya and the others meet the Xyz Resistance, who discuss how Heartland fell to ruin and Yusho's mysterious connection to them. Elsewhere, in the Fusion Dimension, Yuzu flees Academia soldiers when someone unexpected comes to her rescue.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E104 Rumble in the Rubble
programme.desc: Yusho explains what happened during his disappearance to Yuzu while in the Fusion Dimension. Back in Heartland, Yuya comes across an angry youth with a grudge against his Dueltaining style as Yuto refuses to stand by any longer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Shun is determined to convince Kaito to rejoin the Resistance despite Kaito's adamant refusal. As the former friends cannot convince each other either way, they decide all they can do is fight against each other.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yusho reveals that three years ago he learned of the Arc Area Project and Academia's machinations, going on a journey to stop Leo's plans. Yuri arrives at the You Show Duel School to stamp out the resistance against Academia.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Allen and Sayaka try to fight Kaito only to end up facing Grace and Gloria Tyler, two of Academia's strongest enforcers. Having no choice but to fight, they face off against the Tyler's Amazoness deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As Sawatari and Gongenzaka both fail to defeat the Tyler sisters, Yuya and Shun arrive to meet their challenge. In the face of their near perfect combo, Yuya must not give into his rage and defeat his powerful foes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As Sawatari and Gongenzaka both fail to defeat the Tyler sisters, Yuya and Shun arrive to meet their challenge. In the face of their near perfect combo, Yuya must not give into his rage and defeat his powerful foes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya and the others try to return to the Resistance base when they are attacked by the Obelisk Force. They try to face the power of the Obelisk Force when Shun becomes gravely injured during the battles.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Academia's enforcer Edo Phoenix challenges Yuya to a rematch. Torn between his allegiance to the Professor and his spirit of Dueltaining, a confused Edo is determined to crush Yuya and the ghost of Yusho that haunts him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As their duel goes on, Edo only becomes more conflicted of where his allegiances lie. Seeing Edo suffer, Yuya is determined to remind him how fun dueling can be and begins his greatest Dueltaining performance yet.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Convincing Edo, the Tyler twins, and the rest of the forces in Heartland to join their side, Yuya and the other Lancers prepare to head to the Fusion Dimension to find their friends and restore everyone who has been turned into a card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya encounters his old foe from the Junior Youth Championship, Kachidoki. Kachidoki continues to use violent tactics and powerful Fusions in his Action Duels as Yuya tries to return a smile to his heart.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E114 All Duel Hands on Deck
programme.desc: Yuya and co board a ship to Duel Academy when Dennis catches up to them, aiming to defeat Yusho once and for all. A still vengeful Kaito meets Dennis's challenge as the two unleash their greatest monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Serena, who appeared before the Lancers, suddenly betrays them and captures Yuzu while Yuya is forced to fight Captain Solo. Caught between useless cards and Solo's lock deck, things seem hopeless when more allies suddenly arrive.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Serena, who appeared before the Lancers, suddenly betrays them and captures Yuzu while Yuya is forced to fight Captain Solo. Caught between useless cards and Solo's lock deck, things seem hopeless when more allies suddenly arrive.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yugo meets with up the others and agree to work together against Academia. Yugo and Kaito head to the towers where Rin and Ruri are being held captive, only to face the guardians Apollo and Diana.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E117 Grip of the Parasite
programme.desc: The Doctor has brainwashed Ruri and Rin, leading them to fight against Yugo and Kaito. Meanwhile, Reiji recounts how all of Yuya's counterparts as well as all the bracelet girls are part of Leo's ultimate plan: Revival Zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E118 Survival Of The Fittest
programme.desc: Yuya and the Lancers finally make it the Academy, but they are captured and thrown into a wild battle royale against the Obelisk Force. However, a mysterious enemy in the royale begins wiping out friend and foe alike.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Allie is looking to make a big splash at the Arc League Championship, but she soon finds herself in over her head! Can Allie's deck of fishy friends turn the tides, or will her mysterious opponent sink her chances of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The wild duelist known as Battle Beast crushes his fellow Academy students and even turns Crow and Tsukikage into cards. Yuya and Gongenzaka arrive to face the challenge of their insane foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E121 Taming of The BB
programme.desc: Jack appears out of nowhere and joins Yuya in fighting against Battle Beast. Battle Beast's instructor, Sanders, joins in the duel as well to show the power and glory of the Academy to the Lancers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Battle Beast continues his rampage against friend and foe alike. Sensing nothing but rage and anger in Battle Beast's heart, Yuya is determined to show him how fun dueling can actually be and aims to purge his demons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Asuka stays behind to fight Yuri while Sora and the others go on ahead. Yuri uses a different deck and fights Asuka, who tries to reach out a helping hand to Yuri. That's when Yuri reveals the real reason why he does what he does.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya comes across Ruri, who is still under the control of the Doctor's parasites. Yuya attempts to fight off Ruri, made harder when Serena joins the fight. Yuto decides to take control and face the two girls.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Return to the Spirit World, Part 1
programme.desc: Due to Rex Goodwin's special permission, a consolation game is to be held. Luna is called to participate. Leo is unable to substitute and Luna reluctantly comes forward. Her opponent, Professor Frank, has a trip to the Duel Monsters Spirit World planned.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Return to the Spirit World, Part 2
programme.desc: Luna engages in her Duel with Professor Frank when she is called by a mysterious voice to protect the Duel Monsters Spirit World Seeing the turmoil evildoers are doing to this land, Luna must take all her courage and skill at hand to defeat Frank's trump card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Second Round Showdown, Part 1
programme.desc: The first day of the Fortune Cup comes to a close. Before their Duel begins tomorrow, Yusei and Greiger have a friendly talk during the night.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Second Round Showdown, Part 2
programme.desc: Determined to carry out his mission to his hometown, Greiger uses "Flying Fortress SKY FIRE" to run Yusei down. In response, Yusei reads Greiger's strategy and looks for his chance to counterattack.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: The second round of the finals pits Akiza Izinski against Commander Koda. Koda begins his strategy of tormenting Akiza with her record of the past 16 years, in which flashbacks of Akiza's life are shown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Duel of the Dragons, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei Fudo confronts and questions Akiza Izinski on why she calls the Mark of the Dragon a "wretched mark". During the Duel against her, Yusei is filled with various doubts about Akiza.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Duel of the Dragons, Part 2
programme.desc: The Duel between Yusei Fudo and Akiza Izinski continues. Unconvinced that Akiza truly takes pleasure in bringing pain on others, he tries to reach through to her and get her to admit this and realize that she can think for herself.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E36 Rage of the Egyptian Gods
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed! The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E37 Awakening of Evil, Part 1
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City Finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion’s strategy that guarantees Joey victory… or is Joey falling into another trap?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Awakening of Evil, Part 2
programme.desc: Odion’s Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey’s monsters… and his life points! Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he already too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Awakening of Evil, Part 3
programme.desc: It’s a feeding frenzy as Odion’s Serket devours Joey’s monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Serket when it ingests Joey’s monsters whenever they’re summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E40 Awakening of Evil, Part 4
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster The Winged Dragon of Ra and targets it to annihilate the rest of Joey’s life points! However, is Odion able to control the ultimate power of an Egyptian God, or will The Winged Dragon of Ra punish all those unworthy of summoning it?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E41 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 1
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City Finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it’s a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing life points equals losing your memories! As Marik’s true sinister self comes to the surface, does Mai stand a chance against this malevolent evil?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 2
programme.desc: As Mai loses more and more of her memories under Marik’s relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends’ neverending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E43 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 3
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik’s The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she’s unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities! Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself and incinerates Mai with the full fury of The Winged Dragon of Ra?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 A Duel With Destiny: Kaiba Vs. Ishizu, Part 1
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City Finals, Kaiba’s mystery opponent is… Ishizu! With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play! Does Kaiba stand a chance against an opponent who knows his moves even before he does?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E45 A Duel With Destiny: Kaiba Vs. Ishizu, Part 2
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel – she will defeat Kaiba with her trap! How can Kaiba win when it’s already destined that he will lose? It’s time for Kaiba to change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik’s evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E47 Showdown in the Shadows: Marik Vs. Bakura, Part 1
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and the Millennium Ring, and the loser will be trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever! To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally in the form of… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E48 Showdown in the Shadows: Marik Vs. Bakura, Part 2
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm! But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba’s blimp speeds towards KaibaCorp Island for the final rounds of the Battle City Tournament, the ship is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen – five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba’s past who are out for revenge! With the power of cyberspace on Noah’s side, Yugi and friends are trapped inside a new and dangerous Duel Monsters game!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 1"
programme.desc: Noah displays the power of his virtual world by splitting up Yugi’s gang and flinging them into the far reaches of his self-created universe! The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley’s Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against Gansley, in the form of "Deepsea Warrior", but struggles with the complexities of the dueling field and the new rules. Tea faces peril from a vicious tribe of cyclopses while Kaiba and Mokuba are brought to a setting similar to their old orphanage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik’s nefarious Rare Hunters – the silent but deadly Strings! Strings stops all of Yugi’s attacks with Revival Jam, a slippery slime that resurrects whenever it’s destroyed! How can Yugi win if he can’t even put a dent in Strings’s life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E65 Traits of a Traitor
programme.desc: With the Friendship Cup about to kick off, Yuya learns about tournament champion Jack’s rise to the Tops!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The first duel of the Friendship Cup has the green light as Crow and Gong put the pedal to the metal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Riley’s been chosen to Turbo Duel Shinji, but the battle hits a speedbump when Yuya steps in to stop the duel and keep his pint-sized pal in one piece!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: For Shinji to inspire the Commons to stand up to the Topsiders, he must first take down Moon Shadow! Can Shinji’s monsters swarm together and deliver the sting of defeat, or will Moon Shadow’s ninjas silence all the buzz?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya’s friends are forced to face off in a duel where the loser is banished forever! No matter who wins, Yuya loses!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E70 The Gift of Grit
programme.desc: As the Friendship Cup picks up the pace, Jack Atlas takes a timeout to reveal the secrets of his past!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Officer 227 is in hot pursuit to take Yuya down - all the way down to the underground! Can Yuya outrun the long arm of the law, or does 227 have his number?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Sylvio finally takes center stage at the Friendship Cup, but will he crash and burn under the spotlight?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: An escapee from the underground brings word to Yuya on how to take control of the Friendship Cup!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E125 Rise Of The Parasites
programme.desc: Yuya and Yuto are struggling in their battle against Ruri and Serena and their Parasite Queen. The Doctor attempts to take control of Yuya using a parasite as well, but that only awakens the rage inside of Yuya once again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo Akaba reveals to Yusho Sakaki how the four dimensions came to be.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo continues his story about how Zarc destroyed the original world. Leo's daughter Ray used four cards to stop Zarc and split the world into the four current worlds. He then reveals the true nature of Yuya, Yuzu, and the Arc Area Project.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo begins his final plan to fuse the dimensions and revive his daughter Ray. Reiji and Yuya team up to take down Leo, with Yuya resolving not to let Zarc be revived. Yusho realizes that even this is part of a larger enemy's plan.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo's plan gets further and further to completion, which causes the evil inside of Yuya to emerge once more. Yusho stops the duel and realizes that Zarc's influence is hovering over everything, including Yuya's other counterparts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yugo and Yuri being their duel, with Zarc's shared influence forcing them into battle. To stop Zarc's revival, Kaito and Edo join the battle as well to hold back Yuri's powerful Fusion Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: While Yuri and Yugo continue their savage battle, Reira starts hearing the voice of Ray. Aiming to make sure Ray is revived, Reira stands against Reiji and the siblings begin a duel with each other.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Reiji manages to defeat Reira, continuing on to fight Leo. Elsewhere, Yuri absorbs Yugo and aims to defeat Yuya so that Zarc can be completed. Yusho stands in for his son to fight the depraved youth instead.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yusho's advanced Dueltaining manages to push Yuri into a corner and bring Yuya back to his old self. But Yuri is determined to complete Zarc's revival and has one nasty surprise in store for Yusho.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Seeing his father carded in front of his eyes, Yuya's rage reaches a boiling point as he accepts Yuri's challenge. But not only does he have to contend with Yugo and Yuri's dragons, but Zarc's ever growing influence over him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The four dimensions start to fuse together as Yuya continues to struggle against Yuri. Forced to discard his trump card, things seem hopeless. Yuya's friends then arrive to encourage him to keep fighting no matter what.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E136 A Most Brutal Duel
programme.desc: Yuya absorbs all of his counterparts and reclaimed his true form as Supreme King Z-ARC. Starting to lay waste to the Fusion Dimension, Sora and Edo challenge Zarc to try and reach out to Yuya's spirit.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The four dimensions continue to unite as Zarc effortlessly crushes Sora and Edo. Kaito and Shun continue the fight against Zarc while people from Heartland and Neo Domino City start appearing in the Fusion Dimension.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Gongenzaka and Jack fight against Zarc next, trying their best to reach out to Yuya's soul buried in Zarc's darkness. A revived Crow and Sawatari decide to join in when Zarc's Supreme King Dragons swarm the field.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Crow notices that Zarc is starting to lose his composure, leading him and Sawatari to up their game against Zarc's dragons. As dimensional integration is getting closer to completion, Reiji tries to convince his dad to stop Zarc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E140 A Ray of Hope
programme.desc: Ray's soul possesses Reira so she can battle against Zarc alongside Reiji. Zarc boasts that he is the creator of Pendulum Summon, but Ray is determined to stop him once and for all using the four natural energy cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E141 Swinging Back into Action
programme.desc: Things have seemingly returned to normal in the Pendulum Dimension, but Yuya gets the feeling that something is missing. Reiji has him duel against Tsukikage to restore his memories and make him finish the Lancer's goal for good.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The battle royale continues. As Yuya keeps fighting, his memories start flooding back to him. Yuzu's dad suddenly remembers too as the rest of the world slowly begins to remember the Lancers and the battle against Zarc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Reiji reveals that Zarc is still alive and Reira is barely holding back his malevolence. The world must be united and Yuya must purge Zarc's evil once and for all. Yuya is unsure. but Gongenzaka attempts to ignite his fighting spirit.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya arrives in the Xyz Dimensions with Dennis as his next opponent. Threatening to turn the traumatized citizens of Heartland into cards again, Dennis forces Yuya into a duel against him and his Xyz/Fusion mix.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya arrives in the Fusion Dimension where he finds a distraught Shun. Like with Yuya's counterparts, Ruri and the others have not been resurrected following Ray's revival. Yuya tries to calm Shun down only to end up the target of his fury.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E146 One Way Street to Defeat
programme.desc: Jack appears to taunt Yuya over his fear of using his counterpart's dragons in fear of summoning Zarc. Unable to accomplish anything as is, Yuya challenges Jack to a duel while Reiji makes it so everyone can watch the battle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya finally listens to his other selves and summons all four of his dragons to defeat Jack. However, there is one final challenge before him in order to become a Dueltainer and purge Zarc: his rival and friend Reiji Akaba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The curtain is about to fall for the last time. The final battle between Yuya and Reiji rages on. Dragons face off against D/D/D as the whole world watches. What will be the final fate of Yuya, Yuzu, and all four dueling dimensions?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi's strategy is hindered by Gansley's Deck Master ability. Tristan and Duke face a mean dinosaur to save Serenity. Meanwhile, Kaiba and Mokuba confront painful visions of their miserable childhood, but within the heartache may lurk the key to Noah's true intentions.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Téa is led by a penguin to Crump, in the form of Nightmare Penguin, who challenges her to a duel. She learns immediately that dueling in the virtual realm differs starkly from her previous duels, and starts to succumb to the virtual playing field.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite gaining a lead with Maha Vailo, Téa falls behind as Crump begins an assault on her life points, causing the ice around her to grow. With the help of her Deck Master, Dark Magician Girl, and Yugi's Dark Magician, Téa gains enough confidence to win.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey faces the Big 5's lawyer, Johnson, in a courtroom duel. Joey pulls an early lead with his Deck Master, Flame Swordsman, but Johnson's Deck Master, Judge Man, has abilities of his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey attempts to pull through with several luck-based cards, but Johnson's cheating tactics ruin all his chances, until an angry Noah puts a stop to him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan, Duke and Serenity duel Nesbitt, the Big 5's mechanical expert. Serenity's lack of experience with the game and Nesbit's powerful machine monsters create a tragic end for Tristan.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Tristan gone and Serenity in shock, Duke attempts to defeat Nesbitt by himself. But when Orgoth the Relentless is destroyed by his Perfect Machine King, Duke tries to help Serenity regain confidence in her abilities. The two later remember Tristan's face down card, hoping it will help them win.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 Settling the Score — Part 1
programme.desc: As Nesbitt (in Tristan's body) kidnaps Mokuba, Kaiba is forced to duel Lector, the former assistant to his stepfather. For Lector, the duel is personal, as he plans to take what he believes is rightfully his—KaibaCorp. Meanwhile, Tristan rejoins the group; his friends do not recognize him, since his mind has been downloaded into a mechanical monkey.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 Settling the Score — Part 2
programme.desc: With Lector's Jinzo Deck Master destroying all of Kaiba's traps, Imperial Order destroying all his spell cards, and Lector's unreachable Satellite Cannon striking from space, Kaiba doesn't seem to stand a chance. Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba keeps him believing that his brother will pull out with a victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi, Kaiba, and Tea are separated from the others as the Big 5 (minus Nesbitt) plan to take their bodies anyway. As Noah tortures Kaiba by brainwashing Mokuba, he reveals his true identity as Gozaboro Kaiba's biological son.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E14 Merger of the Big Five — Part 1
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five, who are using Tristan's body.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 Merger of the Big Five — Part 2
programme.desc: The Big 5 attempt various strategies of victory, with the aim of eliminating Joey first. However, their poor teamwork soon puts Yugi and Joey ahead. Lector then calls their most powerful monster to the field, the Five Head Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 Merger of the Big Five — Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey are forced to use their strongest monsters to take down the Five-Headed Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E17 Brothers in Arms — Part 1
programme.desc: Kaiba and Noah duel for full control of KaibaCorp, but Noah's revelations and constant manipulation of the playing field complicate things for Kaiba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E18 Brothers in Arms — Part 2
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark puts Kaiba in a difficult position, as he scrambles to find a winning strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E19 Brothers in Arms — Part 3
programme.desc: Kaiba regains control of the duel, but Noah brings a brainwashed Mokuba out to hinder his plans. After finally breaking through to Mokuba, Kaiba tries to embrace his brother before Noah, jealous over their close relationship, turns them to stone.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E20 Noah's Final Threat — Part 1
programme.desc: Enraged at Noah's cruel games, Yugi takes over for Kaiba and duels Noah with only 400 life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E21 Noah's Final Threat — Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi's efforts to win the duel are further complicated by Noah, who turns all of his friends into stone statues, leaving Yugi feeling alone and without hope.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E22 So Close Yet So Far
programme.desc: Gozaboro Kaiba reveals himself and plans to virtualize the entire world to create a digital kingdom. With Noah's unlikely aid, Yugi and the others must escape while fending off memories from the past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E23 Burying the Past — Part 1
programme.desc: Using Mokuba's body, Noah escapes and sets the virtual world to self-destruct. But Mokuba's kindness breaks through his heart, and he tries to set the others free. Meanwhile, Kaiba duels Gozaboro, who summons a seemingly unstoppable monster—Exodia Necross.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E24 Burying the Past — Part 2
programme.desc: ami Marik destroys the computers in the control room, disabling the controls for the self-destruct mechanism, which turns the situation desperate. Meanwhile, Kaiba defeats Gozoboro Kaiba, and he and Yugi rush to the exit before the virtual world explodes. Noah erases Gozoboro's files and releases his mind, and finally makes peace with his family, and prepares for the destruction of the virtual world.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E25 Back to Battle City — Part 1
programme.desc: Yugi and the others arrive at KaibaCorp Island and The Battle City Finals resume. To decide who will duel whom, the four duelists--Yugi, Joey, Kaiba, and Marik-- face each other in a four-way duel in the Duel Tower.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E26 Back to Battle City — Part 2
programme.desc: The four-way duel continues with Joey determined to duel Marik in order to save Mai while Marik and Kaiba both intend to face Yugi. Meanwhile, Ishizu reflects on her past.

programme.desc: A fisherman's livelihood is in jeopardy because of the amount of time he devotes to his comatose son.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help a doctor confront a secret he's kept from everyone, including his own family.

programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use, but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A country doctor refuses to slow down and seems to be working himself to death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again, and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A war correspondent finds himself imprisoned and facing execution. Meanwhile, Jonathan and Mark show him what's he's missed during his life by putting work ahead of family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Hawaiian singer learns to overcome self-pity after being disabled in a truck accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a teenage cancer patient named Lee who wants to save the dolphins.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka voittaa palkinnon radio-DJ:ltä, saa tietää totuuden Seefrasta ja löytää Meethus-kaavion.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Alkuperäisen Kansainyhteisön tiedemies ilmestyy, kiinni ajan silmukassa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Flavin palaa, mikä sytyttää jengisodan, ja auttaa Dylania kehittymään Paradinina.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Seefrasta löydetään tunneleita, joiden kautta voi päästä kahdeksalle muulle Seefra-planeetalle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun vanha mies tapetaan, Beka, Rhade ja Harper ovat pää epäiltyjä ja joutuvat oikeuteen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rhade johtaa kapinallisia taistelussa Seefra-5:n sotapäällikköä vastaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan saa selville, että Bekan poikaystävä oli oikeasti Drago Musevini, ja hän käytti Bekan DNA:ta luodakseen nietzscheläiset.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper löytää ohjelman, joka voi tuhota kahdeksan Seefra-planeettaa ja tappaa miljoonia ihmisiä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Samalla kun Harper yrittää pelastaa Seefra-järjestelmän, vakooja hiipii Andromedalle ja hyökkää Bekan kimppuun.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Seefran vilkkuva aurinko yritetään korjata, mutta Trance korvataan kaksoisolennolla.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun Dylan loukkaantuu vakavasti laboratoriossa tapahtuneessa räjähdyksessä, hän matkustaa erilaisten vaihtoehtoisten todellisuuksien läpi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Sotapäällikkö vakuuttaa seuraajilleen, että ulkoplaneettojen lähestyvä tuho on juoni, jonka tarkoituksena on helpottaa heidän planeettansa ryöstämistä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade ja Beka työskentelevät yhdessä pelastaakseen Trancen Methus-2:lta ja Harperin kenraali Burmalta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö pääsee lopulta pois Seefra-järjestelmästä ja saa selville, että Dylan on viimeinen Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Viimeinen taistelu New Systems -kansainyhteisön pelastamiseksi alkaa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon lähelle jäänyt kapteeni Dylan Hunt joutuu palkkasoturien pelastusaluksen jäljille ja huomaa, että hänet on jäädytetty ajassa 300 vuodeksi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan löytää avaruusaseman, joka on täynnä lapsia, jotka uskovat, että hänen tehtävänään on tuoda rauha tappamalla heidän vihollisensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedan miehistö opettelee yhä työskentelemään yhdessä, kun Restorersit hyökkäävät heidän kimppuunsa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda sekaantuu Than-planeetan ja nietzscheläisen siirtokunnan väliseen riitaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Liukuvirta lähettää Andromedan ajassa taaksepäin juuri ennen Kansainyhteisön kaatumista. Miehistön on puututtava asiaan säilyttääkseen historian.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon ansiosta Dylan voi kommunikoida entisen morsiamensa kanssa 300 vuotta taaksepäin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan on vangittuna vankiplaneetalla, ja hänen on järjestettävä pako, kun hänen miehistönsä yrittää järjestää oman pelastuksensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kastalialaiset nousevat Andromedalle viimeistelläkseen uuden kansainyhteisön peruskirjan. Kun johtaja löydetään kuolleena, Tyr on pääepäilty.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka saa tietää, että hänen isänsä entinen liikekumppani myy erittäin riippuvuutta aiheuttavaa huumetta.

programme.title: Baby Quest
programme.desc: A young lady, who will stop at nothing to have a baby, uses the opportunity of a new relationship to get what she wants when other means fail.

programme.title: Scars Ep 5
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 6
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Long Shadow
programme.desc: A supposed get together turns into the unraveling of dark secrets, when an intruder comes to stalk, leaving everyone at the edge.

programme.title: Violet
programme.desc: Temi is on the verge of tying the knot with his long time girlfriend Renny, but inexplicably changes his mind when he meets a blind lady named Violet.

programme.title: Anger Of Death
programme.desc: A priest, known for his outspokenness, is faced with the challenge of standing up for his people through his prominent position.

programme.title: Love and Everything In-Between
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Love And Everything In Between tells the story of Amanda and Jude and how their unlikely meeting spins into something beautiful. When Amanda is robbed on her first day in Lagos and has no where to go, rich boy Jude offers her a place to stay in his family home, which leads them to begin to work together.

programme.title: Adùnní
programme.desc: Adunni struggles with the weight of a secret she carries, but when she finds out her secret isn’t limited to just her alone, she find the inner strength to seek justice and speak out.

programme.title: In Bloom Ep 1 - Period
programme.desc: A collection of 5 short films addressing gender equality issues such as period poverty, child marriage, gender-based violence, HIV and economic empowerment. First Short: "Period" - written and directed by Nicole Teeny (USA). Like many of her classmates at her underserved school, Fay cannot afford menstrual products, so she sets out on a crusade to get them for free.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Beneath the seemingly perfect marriage of Lisa and John lies a web of lies and betrayal which begins to unravel when infidelity surfaces and a shocking kidnapping throws their world into chaos.

programme.title: Scars Ep 1
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Silhouette
programme.desc: A woman dissatisfied in her marriage complicates things further when she begins an affair with her cook despite being warned against it by everyone around her.

programme.title: Reform
programme.desc: Two detectives are forced to team up with a sinister criminal to save the daughter of an important man. Can they put their differences aside for the mission?

programme.title: Cat And Dog
programme.desc: A pair of young tenants are constantly at odds with their landlord due to unpaid rent. She decides to make their living arrangement very uncomfortable for them.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A newly engaged woman makes a wish that her fiancee take the planning of their wedding seriously, and to her surprise and dismay, her wish comes true.

programme.title: Love on the Vines
programme.desc: When Diana inherits half her uncle’s vineyard, she is surprised to find a rule requiring her to work the land with new co-owner Seth or risk losing the land.

programme.title: Made For You, With Love
programme.desc: A secondhand wedding dress owner helps brides find their dream gowns but fears giving love a second chance.

programme.title: The Charm of Love
programme.desc: Art historian Maddie searches for the "Lovers Stone" in the Caribbean with the help of a charming hotelier.

programme.title: My Daddy is in Heaven
programme.desc: Becky, Adam and their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragic accident during a 4th of July celebration kills their father. Struggling with grief, Becky decides she needs to leave the family farm and all its memories. She leaves Acie with her grandfather Ben and visits with her friend from school, June. With all the best intent, June offers Becky plenty of distraction from her family life. Fueled by her anger at G*d and loss of faith, Becky starts drinking and making other self-destructive choices. Then, after Becky is arrested, Ben threatens to keep Acie until Becky is back on track. A chance encounter in a bus station with a traveler gives Becky what she needs to...

programme.title: The Wrong Husband
programme.desc: Melanie discovers her husband is actually his twin, Alex, back to steal his life—and willing to kill for it.

programme.title: Watching Over You
programme.desc: A security guard's unhealthy obsession with a single mom and her daughter escalates into something terrifying.

programme.title: The Past Never Dies
programme.desc: CASEY MARSH was born in captivity. Her mother, JANE, was abducted as a teenager and gave birth to Casey while she was being held by the kidnapper, TIMOTHY FAST. Jane eventually escaped when Casey was 6 years old. Timothy Fast was arrested and incarcerated. Ever since, Jane has struggled to regain a normal life for her and her daughter. For Casey, the memories of a childhood in captivity still haunt her. Jane, on the other hand, has seemingly moved on. She has re-married and is happy. When a number of local women start to go missing, Jane reveals to Casey that Timothy might have had an accomplice and wonders if he is involved. The kidnapping M.O. is eerily similar. Casey is furious that...

programme.title: The Perfect Cheerleader
programme.desc: Cassie's dream cheerleading squad takes a dark turn when a new man and a murder uncover a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wrong Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Richards, a successful plastic surgeon, is caught in a narcissistic patient's scary quest for perfection.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Episode 8 - Heart of Fire
programme.desc: Vicki and Mike must overcome their animosity and search the city for Henry while he’s being tortured.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: After 73 errors about firefighters in her last romance novel, Jo's publisher, Diana, insists on weeks of research for her next book by training at a military boot camp run by her navy seal brother.

programme.title: A Moving Romance
programme.desc: After inheriting her family's moving company, a young woman starts to clash with the manager who thought he was going to take over.

programme.title: Baby Bootcamp
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Julia is down on her luck, trying to make her baby boot camp a thriving business. To make ends meet, she becomes a part-time nanny for a single widowed father. Trouble is, she knows nothing about taking care of children.

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: Laura Paddington is overcome with joy when her daughter, Zoe, returns to her after being abducted 17 years before--but is Zoe really her long lost child?

programme.title: The Bad Son
programme.desc: An elusive serial killer is killing innocent women in Seattle. The police and FBI are on the killer's trail but were never prepared to face a bizarre twist in the case.

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A poet with an abusive husband reaches out to a fan for help, only to find an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop owners despise each other but begin to fall in love while sending each other messages on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: A Moving Romance
programme.desc: After inheriting her family's moving company, a young woman starts to clash with the manager who thought he was going to take over.

programme.title: Baby Bootcamp
